L1.head: dielectric gradient metamaterials
L1.claim: 介电梯度超材料与3D打印结合使动态THz金属透镜成为可能

L1.head: dynamic THz metalenses
L1.claim: 动态THz金属透镜实现相位和振幅的实时调谐

L1.head: real-time phase and amplitude tunability
L1.claim: 实时调谐能力克服传统静态透镜限制

L1.head: overcoming static limitations
L1.claim: 突破静态限制显著增强成像适应性

L2.head: dielectric gradient metamaterials
L2.claim: 多层结构增强介电梯度超材料性能

L2.head: multi-layered structures
L2.claim: 多层设计实现复杂光场操控

L2.head: complex light manipulation
L2.claim: 复杂操控可校正高阶色差

L2.head: correcting chromatic aberrations
L2.claim: 色差校正实现宽谱消色差超分辨

L2.head: two-photon polymerization
L2.claim: 双光子聚合显著提升打印精度

L2.head: enhanced 3D printing
L2.claim: 高精度制造实现超精细结构

L2.head: ultra-fine features
L2.claim: 超精细结构是高NA宽视场透镜的基础

L2.head: high-NA wide-FOV metalenses
L2.claim: 高性能透镜提升超分辨成像质量

L3.head: dielectric gradient metamaterials
L3.claim: 主动调谐元件与超材料结合

L3.head: active tuning elements
L3.claim: 主动元件实现折射率实时调节

L3.head: real-time adjustment
L3.claim: 动态调节保持最佳成像状态

L3.head: maintained performance
L3.claim: 性能稳定增强环境适应性

L3.head: high-aspect-ratio nanopillars
L3.claim: 高纵横比柱与散射体协同集成

L3.head: combined structures
L3.claim: 结构组合增强光操控能力

L3.head: phase and amplitude control
L3.tail: numerical aperture and field of view
L3.claim: 参数控制提升NA与视场范围
